Graphic design

Projects & campaigns.

Selected graphic-design work. Each opens the full project on my site.

Cover · Illustration

Think Again

An illustrated cover and spine concept for Adam Grant's Think Again.
Cover · Typography

Project Two

A type-driven cover variant built from a grid of letterforms.

Stamps

Covid Chronicles

An icon system documenting a day in the life during lockdown.
Digital fabrication

Made by machine & hand.

I'm a certified technician in a maker space and like to laser-cut, 3D-print, and fabricate pieces with an Arduino! Unfortunately I don't really capture it in .png or .mp4.

Web design

Designing on the side.

A site I built for fun, an Avatar: The Last Airbender experience that tells you which element you bend.
